{{Quote|Stars end, you could hide an invasion force in here.|Rella on the hangar of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Revenue]]''|<ref name="Cloak of Deception">''[[Cloak of Deception]]''</ref>}}
'''Rella''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] with short brown hair. She was the right-hand-woman, as well as lover, of [[Arwen Cohl]]. She was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a [[Skirmish on Eriadu (pre–Battle of Naboo)|skirmish on Eriadu]] when the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]], by order of [[Eru Matalis]] (who at the time went by the alias [[Havac]]), turned against Cohl at the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]] in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. Captain Cohl survived the skirmish and was determined to avenge her death, tracking the man responsible down.
